## Checklist

### General

- [ ] I have read and followed the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My commits are signed-off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] The PR title is descriptive and follows conventional-commit style.

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows the relevant style guide (Terraform, Ansible, Java, Python, TS, Shell, Helm).
- [ ] `make validate` passes locally.
- [ ] `make test` passes locally.
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes locally.

### Security

- [ ] No secrets, passwords, API keys, or personal credentials are committed.
- [ ] No real personal identifiers (names, emails, phone numbers) are used in mock/test data.
- [ ] Infrastructure changes have been reviewed for least-privilege and encryption.
- [ ] New dependencies have been scanned for known vulnerabilities.

### Testing

- [ ] Unit tests cover new or modified business logic.
- [ ] Integration tests pass (if applicable).
- [ ] Manual testing steps are documented (if UI or workflow changes).

### Documentation

- [ ] README or relevant docs are updated (if user-facing changes).
- [ ] Code comments explain non-obvious logic.
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented with migration steps.
